posts.text:
After watching the Iranian revolution unfold in real time over the last week it's clear to me the world is witnessing history in the making

Unfortunately, there's an uncanny lack of coverage in the mainstream West, I hope that changes

If anyone deserves support, it's Iran 🇮🇷
After the absolute blowout in Venezuela and previously with Iran, it becomes increasingly clear that the 20 year war in the Middle East was by design

Anyone who's been around illegal and low income immigrants before knows the Minnesota daycare scams are just the tip of the iceberg

This is happening all over the country and at a trillion dollar scale

Voters enable it because of white guilt, politicians because of votes

Crazy to me that Twitch just straight up lied about protecting creators from sexual violence and there's video evidence that proves it

The fact that an Amazon-owned company actively tried to cover up sexual assault should be a lot bigger story than it is

Streams and videos should resume this week

Appreciate everyone's support and kindness, thank you. I'm looking forward to broadcasting and seeing you guys again

A few days ago my father passed away. 

It's difficult for me to even find the words for the emptiness it leaves me with, he was my last family member in the state and I was there with him until the end.

I will endure, but I don't think I'll ever be the same

I love you, Pa

Anyone surprised at what happened to Charlie Kirk hasn't been paying attention

Go anywhere, reddit, Twitter, ect, and you'll find thousands of unhinged direct calls to violence over politics

Until it's addressed for what it is, things like this will continue to happen

TL;DR-my dad's health is really bad and I have to take time off to deal with it

As a lot of you guys know, my dad's been going through a lot of medical turmoil in the last few months.

Originally, he went to the hospital for pneumonia then upon leaving had a test that showed acute liver failure that turned out to be pancreatic cancer. Not a good day.

After the diagnosis, we took him to an oncologist who recommended chemotherapy which we did. The first week was fine but the day of the second tr

Anyone trying to play the blame game when a shooting happens and say which "side" the shooter was on is a fucking retard

Read their comments, the manifesto, they're not right or left wing, they're insane.

These people transcend politics and operate in the realm of psychosis

Internet real ID is inevitable, especially for social media 

Denying this is might feel good, but it is a lie and you know it

What isn't inevitable is private companies having access to our public records

The best solution is a gov authentication token that only verifies info

10 months and over 800k signatures later, the Stop Killing Games initiative is almost across the finish line of 1 million.

If you're from the EU and care about game preservation and consumer rights, consider signing this petition

Stopkillinggames.com

Finished Clair Obscur: Expedition 33

Game of the year and it's not even close

10/10

I have to take 1 week off and

-Oblivion remake shadow drops
-Previously NDA Marathon test is made public
-Expedition 33 releases
-Donald begins his 2028 3rd term merch campaign

HOW DOES THIS HAPPEN TO ME
Leaking my DM's is one thing but this is absolutely uncalled for

Everybody always talking about hoeflation but its actually the opposite 

I used to be able to go to gamestop or target and see hot bitches working there every day

Now it's just hogs

Why? Because those girls are at home doing onlyfans now instead of working

Using H1B visas to import genuine S tier .001% talent=good

Using H1B visas as a cheaper alternative to hiring American workers=bad

Am I crazy or is this the obvious reality?

If I think about the "spirit" of America, that's what makes the most sense
Maybe it's just me but I feel like the market for masculine, non conventionally attractive female leads in games isn't as big as the video game industry thinks it is
